title: Terminal Exam Schedule for Grades 6-10
description: The date sheet for the upcoming terminal examinations has been released. Please download the attachment for the detailed timetable.

title: Annual Sports Meet 2026
description: Join us for the Annual Sports Meet. Parents are cordially invited to encourage our young athletes.

title: Holiday Notice: National Day
description: School will remain closed on 2nd October on account of the National Holiday. Normal classes resume on 3rd October.

title: Science Fair Registration Open
description: Registrations for the Inter-School Science Fair are now open for students of Grades 8-12. Submit your abstracts to the Science Department.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting for Primary Section
description: A scheduled PTM will be held this Saturday. Timings will be shared individually via email.
